Perfect! I can see that `github_issues` has a `repo` column. Now I'll create the GitHub issues for each pull request. Let me first create a function to generate the issue data and then insert them:

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(defn create-issue-data [pr]
  {:repo "acme/web"
   :title (str "Verify: " (:title pr))
   :author "system"
   :state "open"
   :labels ""
   :body (str "Created to verify merged PR #" (:number pr) " in repository " (:repo pr) " which closes Linear issue " (:closes_linear pr))})

(def issue-data (map create-issue-data prs-with-linear))
(count issue-data)"}
